name: Pagination
purpose: Page navigation for tables and long fact lists, with optional page-size control.

structures.name: Numbered Pager
structures.notes: Active page uses the primary token; neighbors stay quiet outline.

structures.name: Prev / Next
structures.notes: Minimal control for simple lists; disables edges at bounds.

structures.name: Pager with Summary
structures.notes: Shows result range and a page-size selector for dense tables.

interactionNotes: Disabled edges keep layout stable; never hide prev/next at bounds.
Only the active page is filled; all other controls use the outline button style.
